title: LEGO Star Wars 75434 K-2SO Security Droid Figure - Posable Play & Display Building Toy - Collectible Model Kit incl. an Information Plaque - Gift for Boys, Girls & Adult Andor Fans
features: Star Wars display piece for young fans – Let kids proudly display their Star Wars fandom with this LEGO brick-built K-2SO Security Droid figure from Star Wars: Andor Season 2
Customisable Star Wars building toy for 10+ year old boys and girls – Kids can pose K-2SO’s head and arms and attach the buildable LEGO Star wars droid figure to the stand for display
Fantasy home decor – The LEGO Star Wars set also includes an information plaque with space for the included standard-size K-2SO LEGO droid figure
LEGO Star Wars gift for kids and fans – Give this fun play and display toy as a bithday gift for 10+ year old boys, girls and even adult Star Wars: Andor fans
Intuitive instructions – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive building adventure with tools that let them zoom in and rotate a 3D digital version of their construction model as they build

Collectible LEGO Star Wars sets – LEGO Star Wars building toys and model kits (sold separately) enable kids and adult fans to recreate classic scenes, make up new stories or simply display the buildable models
description: From the manufacturer Star Wars: Andor build-and-display set for fans Let kids showcase their Star Wars fandom with this buildable LEGO figure of K-2SO, as seen in Star Wars: Andor Season 2. Fun building toy for kids This posable, playful brick-built model of K-2SO makes unique desk decor to spark any young Star Wars fan’s imagination. LEGO Star Wars K-2SO Security Droid Build and display Attach the brick-built K-2SO figure to the stand for display. Change it up Pose K-2SO’s head and arms. Also includes… A standard-size K-2SO LEGO droid figure and information plaque. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Star Wars fan gift ideas Explore the huge LEGO Star Wars range and discover other exciting building sets (sold separately) for kids and adults.
